data.label: FloatingX
data.description: Android 上强大的悬浮窗组件，支持 系统浮窗(需要权限)、应用内浮窗(无权限)、局部悬浮(View)，支持边缘吸附、回弹、自定义动画、位置保存、窗口化及分屏后位置修复等。

data.label: FloatingX
data.description: A powerful floating window component for Android, supporting system-level floating windows (requires permission), in-app floating windows (no permission), and partial floating views. It supports edge adsorption, rebound, custom animations, position saving, and position restoration after windowing or split-screen.
